workflow_gaps: no mandatory fail-fast preflight before heavy workflow stages
keyword routing lacks direct trigger coverage for repeat-pattern and mistake-reduction intents
workflow summaries do not report a dedicated preflight gate result
naming_or_policy_issues: rules enforce heavy gates but do not block on unresolved merge markers up front
line-ending and conflict-marker regressions can reach expensive stages before failing

alternatives.summary: Rules-only guidance update with no runtime enforcement
risks: failures still discovered late in the flow

alternatives.summary: Add blocking workflow preflight gate plus synchronized agent/routing/rules metadata
benefits: fails early on conflict markers, unmerged files, missing catalogs, and invalid JSON
reduces repeated fix-check loops by blocking common regressions before lint/test/benchmarks
keeps policy transparent in rules and agent workflow docs
risks: slightly longer startup for workflow commands

alternatives.summary: Aggressive strict mode that blocks on all warnings and full-repo audits every run

recommended.reason: Best balance between preventing repeat errors and keeping workflow speed acceptable.

required_edits.intent: add blocking fail-fast checks for merge conflicts, conflict markers, missing required files, invalid JSON, and CRLF shebangs
run workflow preflight before registry validation and pipeline execution
run preflight in direct pipeline runs unless explicitly skipped
expose preflight command as workflow tool entrypoint
add mandatory preflight and anti-repeat governance rules
add repeat/mistake keyword routing and require preflight step in director/reviewer/decider workflows
route repeat-pattern/mistake intents to reviewer+decider workflow stack
document preflight gate command in system policy contract
require preflight gate in default director workflow
include repeat-error preflight/policy analysis in reviewer workflow
require preflight gate validation during final metadata edits
enforce preflight policy analysis in decision packets
require running workflow preflight before blocking checks
